meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve can't finish projects (Intermediate Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't finish projects. A Intermediate-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelancer Guide: Antigravity Template to Ship Faster
content.seo_description: Stop stalling on SaaS builds. Use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to automate your workflow, impress clients, and ship production-ready apps.
content.answer_block: You are stuck because of decision fatigue and boilerplate bloat. The Antigravity project template provides a battle-tested, opinionated scaffolding that removes the 'blank page' syndrome. By integrating Claude Code, you automate the repetitive implementation tasks, allowing you to focus exclusively on high-value business logic and client-specific requirements.
content.intro:
You’ve been here before: the initial excitement of a new project evaporates into a graveyard of half-finished repositories and abandoned GitHub branches. The client is waiting, the deadline is encroaching, and you are still agonizing over folder structures and environment variables. It’s not a lack of skill; it’s a lack of momentum.

Antigravity changes the physics of your development process. It’s not just a template; it’s a pre-configured, scalable launchpad designed for freelancers who need to deliver professional results without the manual overhead. When paired with the raw power of Claude Code, you stop writing boilerplate and start building value.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Foundation
steps.description: Establish the project skeleton to ensure consistent architecture across all your client work.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the 'freelancer-saas' template. Configure for Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS with standard authentication hooks.

steps.title: Define Schema and Domain Models
steps.description: Quickly map out your database schema to prevent scope creep before writing a single line of application code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate Prisma schema based on a standard SaaS user-subscription model including Stripe integration and team-based access control.

steps.title: Implement Core API Endpoints
steps.description: Automate the creation of CRUD operations to bypass the most tedious part of backend development.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create RESTful API endpoints for the defined user and subscription models. Ensure all routes are protected with middleware.

steps.title: Inject Client-Specific UI Components
steps.description: Use the template's design system to rapidly prototype the UI while maintaining high aesthetic standards.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a responsive dashboard landing page using the existing theme and UI component library.

steps.title: Automate Testing and Deployment
steps.description: Ensure project reliability by setting up automated test suites and deployment pipelines immediately.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure Playwright end-to-end tests for the critical path of the application and set up a Vercel deployment pipeline.

pro_tips: Always use the 'dry-run' flag in Claude Code to review the generated file structure before committing to the disk.
Maintain a custom 'snippets.json' file within your Antigravity folder to reuse your specific UI patterns across different clients.
Use Claude Code to document your code as you write it; prompt it to generate JSDoc comments for every new function added.
Leverage the Antigravity environment variable manager to sync local dev secrets with your cloud provider automatically.
Run a 'security-audit' task via Claude Code every time you add a new third-party dependency to catch vulnerabilities early.
content.next_steps: Once your project structure is live, run a full integration test using Claude Code and deploy your MVP to a staging environment to get immediate client feedback.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting projects stall and start shipping with confidence. Our community of elite AI builders is waiting to help you streamline your workflow and scale your freelance business. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
